## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Include relevant motivation and context.

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Related Issue

Closes # (issue)

## Test Checklist

Please confirm that you have completed the following:

- [ ] `yarn test` passes all tests
- [ ] `yarn typecheck` passes without errors
- [ ] I have added tests for new features
- [ ] I have updated CLAUDE.md roadmap if this is a breaking change
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation

## Screenshots (if applicable)

If this change affects the UI, please provide before/after screenshots.

| Before | After |
| ------ | ----- |
| ...    | ...   |

## Additional Notes

Add any other context about the pull request here.
